name: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
administered_by: Ministry of MSME, implemented by KVIC
retrieval_text: PMEGP is a credit-linked subsidy scheme for setting up new micro-enterprises. Maximum project cost Rs 50 lakh for manufacturing and Rs 20 lakh for service and trading units (revised December 2023). Margin money subsidy ranges from 15% to 35% depending on borrower category and area (urban or rural). Only new units are eligible; one person per family; applicant must be 18 or older. Projects up to Rs 10 lakh are collateral-free per RBI norms. Normal bank interest applies; the scheme provides a subsidy, not a concessional rate. Udyam Registration required after loan sanction.
